name: EgoScale
source_datasets: large-scale egocentric human video (about 20,854 hours, aggregated; sources not enumerated)
data_access: none (method; code coming soon, no dataset released)
suitability: descriptive-only: a VLA scaling-law study that consumes egocentric human video and releases a model, not a new clusterable language corpus
focus_en: A dexterous-manipulation VLA pretrained on about 20,854 hours of action-labeled egocentric human video, demonstrating a log-linear scaling law between human-data scale and prediction error.
focus_cn: 在约 20,854 小时带动作标签的第一人称人类视频上预训练的灵巧操作 VLA，揭示了人类数据规模与预测误差之间的对数线性扩展规律。
datapath_en: EgoScale pretrains a Vision-Language-Action model on about 20,854 hours of action-labeled egocentric human video, more than twenty times larger than prior efforts, unifying diverse sources through a common wrist-level action representation with retargeted dexterous hand actions. It reports a log-linear scaling law between human-data scale and validation loss, and the final policy improves average success by 54 percent over a no-pretraining baseline on a 22-DoF dexterous hand, transferring to lower-DoF hands as an embodiment-agnostic motor prior. It releases a model rather than a new annotation corpus.
datapath_cn: EgoScale 在约 20,854 小时带动作标签的第一人称人类视频上预训练一个视觉-语言-动作模型，规模超过以往工作的二十倍，并通过统一的腕部动作表示与重定向的灵巧手动作整合多种来源。论文报告了人类数据规模与验证损失之间的对数线性扩展规律；最终策略在 22 自由度灵巧手上相比无预训练基线将平均成功率提升 54%，并可迁移到更低自由度的手，作为与形态无关的运动先验。它发布的是模型而非新的标注语料。
flow_cn: 聚合第一人称人类视频（约 20,854 小时）
通过腕部动作表示统一
在 22 自由度灵巧手上微调
no_corpus_en: EgoScale is a scaling study and method, not an annotation source. It consumes large-scale egocentric human video and releases a Vision-Language-Action model (code coming soon); it does not publish a new downloadable language-annotation corpus, so this atlas documents it descriptively with links to the paper and project page.
no_corpus_cn: EgoScale 是一项扩展研究与方法，而非标注来源。它消费大规模第一人称人类视频并发布一个视觉-语言-动作模型（代码即将开源）；它没有发布新的可下载语言标注语料，因此本图谱以描述性方式记录，并链接到论文与项目主页。
example_credit: EgoScale, Zheng et al., NVIDIA GEAR, arXiv:2602.16710 (2026)
example_caption_en: EgoScale pretrains a dexterous-manipulation VLA on large-scale egocentric human video; the project page shows demonstration videos.
example_caption_cn: EgoScale 在大规模第一人称人类视频上预训练灵巧操作 VLA；项目主页提供演示视频。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2602.16710 and the NVIDIA GEAR project page (research.nvidia.com/labs/gear/egoscale). Method/model, no dataset or annotation release (code coming soon); authors Ruijie Zheng et al. (NVIDIA, UC Berkeley, University of Maryland).
citation: Zheng et al., EgoScale: Scaling Dexterous Manipulation with Diverse Egocentric Human Data, arXiv:2602.16710 (2026).
